title: Wizard Schema
description: Schema representing a complete multi-page wizard definition with pages and navigation

id.title: Wizard ID
id.description: Unique identifier for the wizard (kebab-case recommended)

type.title: Schema Type
type.description: Type of schema - must be 'wizard' for multi-page wizards

pages.title: Wizard Pages
pages.description: Array of page configurations for the wizard. Pages are ordered by the 'order' property. See wizard-schema.schema.json for page structure details

id.title: Page ID
id.description: Unique identifier for the page (kebab-case recommended)

schemaUrl.title: Schema URL
schemaUrl.description: Path to the form schema file for this page (e.g., 'schemas/pages/personal-info.schema.json')

schemaId.title: Schema ID
schemaId.description: Alternative: reference schema by ID instead of URL

order.title: Page Order
order.description: Order of this page in the wizard (1-based). Pages should be ordered sequentially for proper wizard flow

buttons.title: Page Buttons
buttons.description: Button configuration for this specific page

previous.title: Show Previous Button
previous.description: Whether to show the 'Previous' button on this page

next.title: Show Next Button
next.description: Whether to show the 'Next' button on this page

save.title: Show Save Button
save.description: Whether to show the 'Save/Submit' button on this page

journeyId.title: Journey ID
journeyId.description: Optional identifier to group related wizards in a user journey
